title: Linear Frequency Mapping
description: Maps gematria word values directly to spatial frequencies via division by a scale factor. f = value / scale_factor. The choice of scale factor determines the visual density of the pattern.

scale_factors.name: tight
scale_factors.note: For small values (1-50): YHWH=26, AHAVAH=13. Dense, close-packed rings.

scale_factors.name: medium_hebrew
scale_factors.note: For mid-range Hebrew values: ELOHIM=86, SHALOM=376.

scale_factors.name: wide_hebrew
scale_factors.note: For large Hebrew values: BEREISHIT=913, SHEMA=815.

scale_factors.name: greek_standard
scale_factors.note: For Greek values: LOGOS=373, ICHTHYS=1224, CHRISTOS=1480.

scale_factors.name: english_ordinal
scale_factors.note: For English ordinal (max 5-letter word ≈ 130): GOD=26, LOVE=54.

visual_interpretation.high_frequency: Fine, dense interference rings — complex, detailed patterns
visual_interpretation.low_frequency: Broad, sparse rings — simple, majestic patterns
visual_interpretation.equal_values: Two equal-value words produce identical spatial frequencies — perfect resonance
